response: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is partially implemented across 116 files, including the assessment engine and dashboard. However, a thorough review of the codebase is required to ensure all UI layers adhere to the three-mode standard (full, mid, low). Next steps: (1) Review `memory/atlas/semantic/product-truth.md` for accurate product specifications, (2) Explore `apps/web/src/components` for UI components requiring adaptation, and (3) Verify `docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md` for any updates on Foundation Laws.
